info.title: Career Pilot API
info.description: Backend API for The Career Pilot  authentication & authorization service

tags.name: Interview Sessions
tags.description: Session lifecycle and question answer submission

tags.name: User Profile
tags.description: View and update user profile, skills, and CV

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Email/password authentication, OAuth, and token management

tags.name: Subscriptions
tags.description: Tier management and upgrades via Paymob

tags.name: Coin Wallet
tags.description: Coin balance and top-up via Paymob

tags.name: Payments
tags.description: Paymob checkout initiation, webhook confirmation, and transaction history

tags.name: Files
tags.description: File upload for avatars, resumes, and CVs

put.description: Use POST /api/v1/otp/verify instead. OTP verification replaces email verification.
Password reset via email is deprecated. OTP-based auth uses phone verification.

delete.description: Admin only. Fails if the track has associated questions or sessions.

post.description: Creates a Paymob checkout for a fixed-price coin pack. Price is determined server-side from coinPackSize, not client-supplied.
Creates a Paymob checkout for the target tier. Takes effect immediately once payment is confirmed via webhook.

post.summary: Schedule a downgrade to a lower tier
post.description: Takes effect at the end of the current billing cycle. No immediate change, no clawback of used quota.
Schedules cancellation at the end of the current billing cycle. No immediate change, no mid-cycle clawback.
Upload a PDF/DOCX CV. Extracts text via Tika, analyzes via LLM, saves skills and profile fields.

Server-to-server callback invoked by the payment provider (e.g. Paymob) after a payment attempt completes. Not authenticated via JWT — verified instead via HMAC signature. Idempotent: replayed webhooks for an already-processed transaction are safely ignored.

parameters.name: queryParams
parameters.description: Provider-specific query parameters, e.g. Paymob's hmac signature

schema.description: Raw JSON request body, preserved unparsed for HMAC verification

200.description: Webhook processed (or safely ignored if already handled)

post.description: Creates a payment intention with Paymob and returns a hosted checkout URL to open in a WebView or browser. Requires exactly one of coinPackSize or tier depending on purchaseType. A PENDING payment transaction is created immediately; it is later confirmed or failed via the webhook endpoint.
Verify the OTP code. If the user is new, creates an account. Returns auth tokens and user info with isNewUser flag.

429.description: Lockout active — too many failed attempts

post.description: Send a one-time password to the user's phone number via SMS or WhatsApp.

429.description: Cooldown active, lockout active, or resend limit reached

post.description: Creates a new IN_PROGRESS session for the given track and generates {questionCount} LLM-powered interview questions.

post.summary: Submit an answer for a session question
post.description: Stores transcript + word timings, computes pacing metrics server-side, and triggers LLM scoring. Cannot submit to a COMPLETED or ABANDONED session.
Upload an avatar, resume, or CV file. Returns the file ID and URL to use in profile update.
Use POST /api/v1/otp/verify instead. Phone OTP signup replaces email registration.
Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access token.
Blacklist the access token and revoke all refresh tokens for the user.
Authenticate using email/username and password. Returns JWT tokens.

get.description: Admin only. Paginated list of all tracks including inactive.
Returns the authenticated user's profile with skills and CV info

patch.description: Update profile fields, skills, and account settings. All fields are optional.
Admin only. Re-activates a deactivated track.

get.description: Public endpoint. Returns only active tracks for user onboarding.
Returns a paginated list of the authenticated user's own payment transactions, most recent first, regardless of status (PENDING, CONFIRMED, FAILED, REFUNDED).
Returns session state, answered questions with scores, and the next unanswered question.

get.summary: List all questions for a session

get.description: Password reset via email is deprecated. OTP-based auth uses phone verification.
Use POST /api/v1/otp/send instead. OTP replaces email codes.
Handles OAuth2 redirect from Google/GitHub. Redirects to frontend with token.
Returns a simple greeting to verify the service is running

delete.summary: Delete all questions for a track

checkoutUrl.description: Paymob-hosted checkout URL to open in a WebView or browser

merchantOrderId.description: Internal merchant order id used to correlate this checkout with its transaction record

PaymentInitiationResponse.description: Response after successfully initiating a Paymob checkout

amount.description: Purchase amount in major currency units (not cents)

coinPackSize.description: Number of coins in the pack. Required when purchaseType is COIN_PACK.

tier.description: Subscription tier being purchased. Required when purchaseType is SUBSCRIPTION.

InitiatePaymentRequest.description: Request to initiate a Paymob checkout for either a coin pack or a subscription tier

currentPassword.description: Required when setting a new password

avatarFileId.description: ID of an uploaded avatar file (from /api/v1/files/upload)

cvFileId.description: ID of an uploaded CV file (from /api/v1/files/upload)

providerTransactionId.description: Transaction id assigned by the payment provider

failureReason.description: Populated only when status is FAILED

coinPackSize.description: Populated only if purchaseType was COIN_PACK

tierPurchased.description: Populated only if purchaseType was SUBSCRIPTION
